ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "invoice_no" TEXT /* Invoice number for the transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "sales_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who handled the transaction */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was issued */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the transaction occurred */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the transaction was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Amount of discount applied to the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the transaction */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address if different from billing address */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currency_exchange_rates ("base_currency")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in a sales transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction to which the item belongs */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the item */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Total amount for the item */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Batch or lot of the item */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the item, if applicable */,
  "returnable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is returnable */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for return, if applicable */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of return, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_items_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_items_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES inventory ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer first made a purchase */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "preferred_store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's preferred store */,
  "preferred_category" TEXT /* Preferred product category of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level to trigger inventory replenishment */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last stock update */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "cost_price" TEXT /* Cost price of the product */,
  "retail_price" TEXT /* Retail price of the product */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level for the product */,
  "max_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase from the supplier */,
  "last_sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sale of the product */,
  "shelf_life" TEXT /* Shelf life of the product, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business (e.g., manufacturer, distributor) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for delivery */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the supplier's performance */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed with the supplier */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders placed with the supplier */,
  "total_amount_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier to whom the order is placed */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store for which the order is placed */,
  "purchase_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., placed, shipped, received) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the supplier */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in a purchase order */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase order to which the item belongs */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the item */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Total amount for the item */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Batch or lot of the item */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the item, if applicable */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the item in the order (e.g., ordered, received, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_order_items_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES inventory ("stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency (e.g., USD, GBP) */,
  "target_currency" TEXT /* Target currency (e.g., EUR, JPY) */,
  "exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate from base currency to target currency */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the exchange rate becomes effective */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate data (e.g., central bank, market) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the exchange rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., sales associate, inventory manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
